creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Thu Jul 19 04:29:25 2012
New Revision: 301138
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/301138

Log:
  - Update to 1.0
  - Pass maintainership to perl
  - Add license
  
  PR:             169882
  Submitted by:   Gea-Suan Lin <gslin@gslin.org> (prev. maintainer)

Modified:
  head/devel/p5-App-GitHub/Makefile
  head/devel/p5-App-GitHub/distinfo

Modified: head/devel/p5-App-GitHub/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-App-GitHub/Makefile	Thu Jul 19 01:52:25 2012	(r301137)
+++ head/devel/p5-App-GitHub/Makefile	Thu Jul 19 04:29:25 2012	(r301138)
@@ -6,21 +6,22 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	App-GitHub
-PORTVERSION=	0.11
+PORTVERSION=	1.0
 CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	App
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	gslin@gslin.org
+MAINTAINER=	perl@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	GitHub Command Tools
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-JSON-XS>=2.3:${PORTSDIR}/converters/p5-JSON-XS \
 		p5-Moose>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Moose \
 		p5-Net-GitHub>=0.12:${PORTSDIR}/net/p5-Net-GitHub
-RUN_DEPENDS=	p5-JSON-XS>=2.3:${PORTSDIR}/converters/p5-JSON-XS \
-		p5-Moose>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Moose \
-		p5-Net-GitHub>=0.12:${PORTSDIR}/net/p5-Net-GitHub
+RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
 
 PERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
 

Modified: head/devel/p5-App-GitHub/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-App-GitHub/distinfo	Thu Jul 19 01:52:25 2012	(r301137)
+++ head/devel/p5-App-GitHub/distinfo	Thu Jul 19 04:29:25 2012	(r301138)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (App-GitHub-0.11.tar.gz) = 578fa45c59a29a05d9ccfbe009ab4c46e9c5516d6dfcd5b98e39a75652607690
-SIZE (App-GitHub-0.11.tar.gz) = 14013
+SHA256 (App-GitHub-1.0.tar.gz) = 7e53046d84593fdbba14e12af91179d77756f1748d38e9d96fcc01e2a7869982
+SIZE (App-GitHub-1.0.tar.gz) = 15972
